projects.title: Reactive Clay
projects.description: What if I made a robot out of ceramics?

projects.title: Down the Clown
projects.description: A huge arcade machine made with the hearts and brains of five electrical engineers
projects.secondaryText: Collaborators: Muskaan Mittal, Riley LaMay, Charlie Herz, Jack Stifter

projects.title: The Inspiration Mechanic
projects.secondaryText: A film exploring the fictional identity of a person in control of the world’s inspiration

projects.title: A Dynamic Portfolio
projects.description: A custom website explicitly designed for my interdisciplinary work, gracefully integrated with Notion and Google Drive.
projects.secondaryText: A custom website that gracefully fits right into my workflow

projects.title: Creative Respiration
projects.description: Is the artist observant as much as they are creative? In this work, I use a robotic play on the established animation medium, the zoetrope, to place the careful intake of ideas on the same plane as production.
projects.secondaryText: A zoetrope and animation about the essentiality of observation in creativity

projects.title: Musical Motors
projects.description: Using networked robots to turn a room into an engaging musical instrument — drawing attention to the constructed environment
projects.secondaryText: A full stack attempt at coordinating performance robots

projects.title: Flowers with Depth
projects.description: Using robotics to take dynamic macro images of local wildflowers — an early project for me
projects.secondaryText: Using robotics to take dynamic pictures of flowers

projects.title: Ringevator
projects.description: A slim mechanism that picks rings off the ground and deposits them at the top of a robot to be loaded into a flywheel
projects.secondaryText: An interesting solution to a space constrained problem

projects.title: Droodles Creative Assistant
projects.description: A co-creative LLM-based agent that employs foundational creative psychology. Plus, an experiment to validate its functionality
projects.secondaryText: Contributors: Erfun Ackley, Patricia Alves-Oliveira, Peter H. Kahn Jr.
